creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
Install either xfig or xfig-devel.  Select a text object from the
left hand panel.  Go to bottom right to select a new postscript
font.  No matter which font is selected xfig and xfig-devel will
automatically select "Default".  Prior to the Xorg churn one 
could select any listed font and xfig and xfig-devel would display
and use that font.

How-To-Repeat: 
See above.
